name: DeskMate
description: 作为依赖策略在随机填充上下文中执行。当 RandomFill 随机分配学生时检查该学生是否有同桌组，若有则尝试将同组学生分配到相邻座位（连携修改）。若目标座位周围无足够相邻空座则请求重掷。
author: A_Pair Team

description.zh-CN: 每行配置一桌学生。学生选择器数量由会场文件的每桌人数自动决定。
description.en-US: Each row configures one desk of students. The number of student pickers is determined by the venue's seats-per-desk setting.

DeskMate_RerollNoAdjacent.zh-CN: 学生 {0} 需要 {1} 个相邻空座，目标座位周围仅有 {2} 个，请求重掷
DeskMate_RerollNoAdjacent.en-US: Student {0} needs {1} adjacent empty seats, only {2} found near target seat, requesting reroll

DeskMate_NearOccupied.zh-CN: 学生 {0} 的同桌已分配，将其安置到相邻座位 {1}
DeskMate_NearOccupied.en-US: Student {0} desk-mate already assigned, placing student at adjacent seat {1}

DeskMate_PartialAssign.zh-CN: 学生 {0} 的同桌组部分分配失败：{1}/{2} 名组员已分配
DeskMate_PartialAssign.en-US: Partial desk-mate assignment for student {0}: {1}/{2} members assigned
